case_title: DAVID REYNOLDS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DAVID REYNOLDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY (CLAIM ADJUSTER). DEFENDANT CCSF INFORMS THE COURT THEY ARE READY TO SETTLE OUTSIDE COURT. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST BY PARTIES AS SETTLEMENT REACHED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REYNOLDS, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYNOLDS, DAVID ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JAN-03-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST BY PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
